details.note: installCli IPC channel lacks handler — preload bridge exposes ipcRenderer.invoke('install-cli') but no ipcMain.handle exists in ipc.ts
New module installs opencode CLI wrapper script to user's bin directory. Shell injection hardened via validateShellCommand.
Added session search filters: time-range dropdown (All/Today/Week/Month) with MenuV2.RadioGroup, integrated with text search filtering via combined .filter() pass. 77 lines added.
Enhanced MCP server dialog: health status indicators (green/yellow/red dots), add server form with name+URL, remove/disconnect button per server. Typecheck passes (0 new errors).

Keyboard shortcut discoverability overlay. Hold-modifier (Meta/Ctrl) for 500ms shows floating overlay with all registered commands grouped by category. Uses existing useCommand system, KeybindV2 components, CSS animations. Typecheck passes.
